title: SoftBank shares surge over 18% as Japan tech-fueled rally lifts Nikkei 225 to record highs
summary_full: The benchmark Nikkei 225 surged over 5% to a record high as Japan reopened after extended Golden Week holidays.
summary_public: The benchmark Nikkei 225 surged over 5% to a record high as Japan reopened after extended Golden Week holidays.
